docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,172.61 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT WALTERSN, ALEXANDER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALTERSN, ALEXANDER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALTERSN, ALEXANDER $4,172.61 PRINCIPAL, $14.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,187.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT OF CLAIM EXEMPTION; NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, FROM SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPT, FILED.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF SEP-16-1999, DENIED AS TO DEFENDANT WALTERSN, ALEXANDER
JUDGMENT CREDITOR APPEARED FOR THE HEARING; NON-APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR.
THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED.
THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.
